message:
fix: relax watch channel test, FCPS minimum frame length, and recovery phrase Debug assertion

- fcp-async-core: watch channel send() on closed channel is now best-effort;
  test asserts is_closed() instead of expecting an error value
- fcp-protocol: FCPS frame decode minimum length check now uses FCPS_HEADER_LEN
  instead of an overly strict constant that assumed fixed field sizes for
  source_id, timestamp, and signature
- fcp-bootstrap: recovery phrase Debug redaction test asserts exact format
  "RecoveryPhrase { word_count: 24, .. }" instead of checking individual
  word absence, which was fragile

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
